subject: Graham, a named Dark Knight character from Final Fantasy Legends, in heavy purple-grey plate armor with a crown-like helm, carrying an ornate scepter-style weapon
description: A large armored humanoid figure stands in a commanding, still pose. The armor is heavy purple-grey plate with organic leaf or vine motifs worked into the pauldrons and chest. The helmet features branching crown-like protrusions resembling antlers or thorns. The figure carries an ornate weapon in one hand — it has a staff-like haft with a decorative head that features swirling color elements (red and blue). The cloak behind the figure is dark. A ghosted larger version of the same armored figure looms in the background, reinforcing the imposing scale. The palette is dominated by purple-grey, dark silver, and muted earth tones. The card identifies this figure as Graham with the Dark Knight job class from the FFL (Final Fantasy Legends) universe.
foreground: Heavy purple-grey armored Dark Knight figure with crown-antler helm, ornate scepter-weapon
background: Ghosted large version of same armored figure, pale yellow card background
emotion: Stoic and commanding; still stance, no visible face expression, weight of authority
